---
title: "Genius Makers — Reminds Me of \"The Intern\""
description: "Cade Metz's Genius Makers — reminds me of De Niro's The Intern."
author: "synesis"
date: "2021-12-27"
categories: [AI, history, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Genius Makers cover.](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

This reminds me of the movie "The Intern" (Robert De Niro). :-)

Cade Metz. Genius Makers: The Mavericks Who Brought AI to Google, Facebook, and the World. 2021.


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_this-reminds-me-of-the-movie-the-intern-activity-6881499676093353984-SVM4).*
